.github/workflows/kitsune.yml

back to top 
diff --git a/.github/workflows/kitsune.yml b/.github/workflows/kitsune.yml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0850d06
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.github/workflows/kitsune.yml
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+name: Kitsune
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  security:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      # Kitsune requires an API key (PAK). Add it in repo settings:
+      #   Settings -> Secrets and variables -> Actions -> New repository secret
+      # Name: KITSUNE_API_KEY
+      - name: Install Kitsune
+        run: |
+          echo "TODO: install kitsune here."
+          echo "Once releases exist, download the right binary for the runner:"
+          echo "  curl -fsSL <release-url> | tar -xz"
+          echo "  sudo mv kitsune /usr/local/bin/kitsune"
+
+      - name: Security scan (secrets)
+        env:
+          KITSUNE_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.KITSUNE_API_KEY }}
+        run: |
+          kitsune security scan --all

.kitsune/config.yaml

back to top 
diff --git a/.kitsune/config.yaml b/.kitsune/config.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..5a09648
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.kitsune/config.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# Local-only overrides for Kitsune (not intended to be committed)
+#
+# Examples:
+# ai:
+#   model_path: ~/.kitsune/models/default.gguf
+# security:
+#   ignore_paths:
+#     - vendor/**
+#   ignore_rules:
+#     - google_api_key

.kitsune/docs/assets/kitsune-docs.css

back to top 
diff --git a/.kitsune/docs/assets/kitsune-docs.css b/.kitsune/docs/assets/kitsune-docs.css
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c686bd1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.kitsune/docs/assets/kitsune-docs.css
@@ -0,0 +1,198 @@
+:root {
+  --ks-max: 1060px;
+}
+
+.ks-brand {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 10px;
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.ks-logo {
+  width: 36px;
+  height: 36px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.ks-page {
+  max-width: var(--ks-max);
+  padding-top: 24px;
+  padding-bottom: 48px;
+}
+
+.ks-hero {
+  margin: 18px 0 18px;
+}
+
+.ks-kicker {
+  margin: 0 0 6px;
+  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.7;
+}
+
+.ks-meta {
+  margin: 8px 0 0;
+  opacity: 0.8;
+}
+
+.ks-dot {
+  padding: 0 8px;
+}
+
+.ks-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  gap: 14px;
+  margin: 14px 0;
+}
+
+@media (min-width: 900px) {
+  .ks-grid {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
+  }
+}
+
+.ks-card {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  padding: 16px;
+  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
+  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
+}
+
+.ks-muted {
+  opacity: 0.75;
+}
+
+.ks-pre {
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  background: rgba(10, 14, 22, 0.95);
+  color: rgba(245, 255, 252, 0.92);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.45;
+}
+
+.ks-changes {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ks-changes li {
+  padding: 12px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
+}
+
+.ks-changes li:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-change-head {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 10px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  align-items: center;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.85;
+}
+
+.ks-sha {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.ks-change-body {
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  font-size: 14px;
+}
+
+.ks-tag-pill {
+  padding: 3px 8px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.ks-tags {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.ks-tag {
+  display: inline-block;
+  padding: 4px 8px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
+}
+
+.ks-tag-num {
+  opacity: 0.75;
+  padding-left: 4px;
+}
+
+.ks-downloads {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+}
+
+.ks-downloads li {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  align-items: center;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  padding: 6px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
+}
+
+.ks-downloads li:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-link {
+  text-decoration: none;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+
+.ks-versions {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ks-version-link {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 10px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.ks-version-link:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-version {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.ks-divider {
+  height: 1px;
+  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
+  margin: 18px 0 12px;
+}
+
+.ks-footer {
+  margin-top: 16px;
+}

.kitsune/docs/index.html

back to top 
diff --git a/.kitsune/docs/index.html b/.kitsune/docs/index.html
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..6124c66
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.kitsune/docs/index.html
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8" />
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
+    <title>Kitsune · Versions</title>
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/themes/simple.css" />
+    <script defer src="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/bareframe.min.js"></script>
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="./assets/kitsune-docs.css" />
+  </head>
+  <body class="bf">
+    <header class="bf-nav">
+      <div class="bf-container bf-row bf-between bf-center">
+        <a class="bf-brand ks-brand" href="./index.html">
+          <img src="./assets/kitsune-logo.svg" alt="Kitsune logo" class="ks-logo" />
+          <span>Kitsune</span>
+        </a>
+        <nav class="bf-row bf-gap-sm">
+          <a href="./index.html">Versions</a>
+          <a href="./../docs/index.html">Docs</a>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+    </header>
+
+    <main class="bf-container ks-page">
+      <section class="ks-hero">
+        <p class="ks-kicker">Release Docs</p>
+        <h1>Versions</h1>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Versioned changelog pages generated by Kitsune.</p>
+      </section>
+
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>All Versions</h2>
+        <ul class="ks-versions">
+          
+          <li>
+            <a class="ks-version-link" href="./v0.1.4/changelog.html">
+              <span class="ks-version">v0.1.4</span>
+              
+                <span class="ks-muted">2026-03-01</span>
+              
+            </a>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <a class="ks-version-link" href="./v0.1.3/changelog.html">
+              <span class="ks-version">v0.1.3</span>
+              
+                <span class="ks-muted">2026-03-01</span>
+              
+            </a>
+          </li>
+          
+        </ul>
+      </section>
+
+      
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Downloads</h2>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Latest binaries are published at:</p>
+        <a class="ks-link" href="https://kitsune-app.com/downloads">https://kitsune-app.com/downloads</a>
+      </section>
+      
+
+      <footer class="ks-footer">
+        <div class="ks-divider"></div>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Generated by <strong>Kitsune</strong>.</p>
+      </footer>
+    </main>
+  </body>
+</html>

diff --git a/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.html b/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.html
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..374e311
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.html
@@ -0,0 +1,215 @@
+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8" />
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
+    <title>v0.1.3 · Kitsune Changelog</title>
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://samueldbines.github.io/bareframe/versions/0.1.2/themes/simple.css" />
+    <script defer src="https://samueldbines.github.io/bareframe/versions/0.1.2/bareframe.min.js"></script>
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/kitsune-docs.css" />
+  </head>
+  <body class="bf">
+    <header class="bf-nav">
+      <div class="bf-container bf-row bf-between bf-center">
+        <a class="bf-brand" href="../index.html">Kitsune</a>
+        <nav class="bf-row bf-gap-sm">
+          <a href="../index.html">Versions</a>
+          <a href="../../../docs/index.html">Docs</a>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+    </header>
+
+    <main class="bf-container ks-page">
+      <section class="ks-hero">
+        <p class="ks-kicker">Changelog</p>
+        <h1>v0.1.3</h1>
+        <p class="ks-meta">
+          Range: <code>e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110</code> → <code>HEAD</code>
+          <span class="ks-dot">·</span>
+          Commits: <code>e5d49af</code> → <code>8427eb5</code>
+        </p>
+      </section>
+
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Changes</h2>
+        <ul class="ks-changes">
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">c3c6245</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">2429114</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">876deb8</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">4a1bd27</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">f1ebac4</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">a3e6359</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">2401e63</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">52f048b</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">31161d8</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">chore: prep release</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">1ba5012</code>
+              
+                <span class="ks-tag-pill">v0.1.1</span>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">0.1.1</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">c7ed445</code>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">chore: prepare 0.1.2 release</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              <code class="ks-sha">a835113</code>
+              
+                <span class="ks-tag-pill">v0.1.2</span>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">0.1.2</div>
+          </li>
+

.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.markdown

back to top 
diff --git a/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.markdown b/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.markdown
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..b7da3f8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.markdown
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Kitsune Changelog: v0.1.3
+
+Range: `e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110` -> `HEAD`
+
+- **c3c6245 (25th Feb 2026)**: Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging
+- **2429114 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment
+- **876deb8 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest
+- **4a1bd27 (25th Feb 2026)**: Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos
+- **f1ebac4 (25th Feb 2026)**: Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples
+- **a3e6359 (25th Feb 2026)**: Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples
+- **2401e63 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata
+- **52f048b (25th Feb 2026)**: Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos
+- **31161d8 (25th Feb 2026)**: chore: prep release
+- **1ba5012 (v0.1.1, 25th Feb 2026)**: 0.1.1
+- **c7ed445 (25th Feb 2026)**: chore: prepare 0.1.2 release
+- **a835113 (v0.1.2, 25th Feb 2026)**: 0.1.2
+- **7ba4d24 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify editor component and add PayPal donate button to examples
+- **5a678ca (26th Feb 2026)**: Move examples to public and add versioned GitHub Pages builds
+- **e9981f5 (26th Feb 2026)**: Include themes in versioned GitHub Pages snapshots
+- **c8bcd3c (26th Feb 2026)**: Prepare v0.1.3: remove default placeholder text in components
+- **dfc0a90 (v0.1.3, 1st Mar 2026)**: chore: update dist, public, scripts, src
+- **8427eb5 (1st Mar 2026)**: chore: sync version files for v0.1.3
+

.kitsune/docs/v0.1.3/changelog.txt

+Change log from e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110 to HEAD

+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: c3c6245a06d91d1dce0a5ff1466919d36d0521ab
+message: Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 24291142b96af40582cdac0a7c733798266565bf

+message: Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 4a1bd270d793a35d6a39736b6e5360abdebe6876
+message: Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: f1ebac4ca9052dfab385b29788acee6aa484f2ea
+message: Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: a3e6359b8764fd683cb35de4ced0d1668215ac7c
+message: Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 2401e63c0b5a0fc5aad78fbe4308bcc598e7852d
+message: Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 52f048bdfd7fb60f73cf2ad8bd6b796a7f70085f
+message: Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 31161d80e2ab36ece01999af6127576dbca017c0
+message: chore: prep release
+
+v0.1.1 [25th Feb 2026] Commit: 1ba5012a8f4775e0919f619b076358f1abcd6a72
+message: 0.1.1
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: c7ed4457033a97a0a0116350e70128dfb14ac310
+message: chore: prepare 0.1.2 release
+
+v0.1.2 [25th Feb 2026] Commit: a83511342d4ff9877679e1a04ca7bb35b26abb7d
+message: 0.1.2
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 7ba4d248cc7f548fabeab51735121d9499611fa2
+message: Unify editor component and add PayPal donate button to examples
+
+[26th Feb 2026] Commit: 5a678ca9d72877f8ebfae54b3baa21544b26d0d1
+message: Move examples to public and add versioned GitHub Pages builds
+
+[26th Feb 2026] Commit: e9981f5bbee24d3cba2e1ebcc6d9c232370e7468
+message: Include themes in versioned GitHub Pages snapshots
+
+[26th Feb 2026] Commit: c8bcd3ccfb7f56d74a26feb55847222ef7d3e27f
+message: Prepare v0.1.3: remove default placeholder text in components
+
+v0.1.3 [1st Mar 2026] Commit: dfc0a905fecf2f07f0f60ced340f0fc2d8bd2a2f
+message: chore: update dist, public, scripts, src
+
+[1st Mar 2026] Commit: 8427eb58323630c2c4a8d1cbd9f01450bfb34bf8
+message: chore: sync version files for v0.1.3
+

+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8" />
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
+    <title>v0.1.4 · Kitsune Changelog</title>
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/themes/simple.css" />
+    <script defer src="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/bareframe.min.js"></script>
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/kitsune-docs.css" />
+  </head>
+  <body class="bf">
+    <header class="bf-nav">
+      <div class="bf-container bf-row bf-between bf-center">
+        <a class="bf-brand ks-brand" href="../index.html">
+          <img src="../assets/kitsune-logo.svg" alt="Kitsune logo" class="ks-logo" />
+          <span>Kitsune</span>
+        </a>
+        <nav class="bf-row bf-gap-sm">
+          <a href="../index.html">Versions</a>
+          <a href="../../../docs/index.html">Docs</a>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+    </header>
+
+    <main class="bf-container ks-page">
+      <section class="ks-hero">
+        <p class="ks-kicker">Changelog</p>
+        <h1>v0.1.4</h1>
+        <p class="ks-meta">
+          Range: <code>e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110</code> → <code>HEAD</code>
+          <span class="ks-dot">·</span>
+          Commits: <code>e5d49af</code> → <code>8427eb5</code>
+        </p>

+

+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging</div>
+          </li>

+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos</div>
+          </li>
+

@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Kitsune Changelog: v0.1.4
+
+Range: `e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110` -> `HEAD`
+
+- **c3c6245 (25th Feb 2026)**: Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging
+- **2429114 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment
+- **876deb8 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest
+- **4a1bd27 (25th Feb 2026)**: Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos
+- **f1ebac4 (25th Feb 2026)**: Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples
+- **a3e6359 (25th Feb 2026)**: Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples
+- **2401e63 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata
+- **52f048b (25th Feb 2026)**: Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos
+- **31161d8 (25th Feb 2026)**: chore: prep release
+- **1ba5012 (v0.1.1, 25th Feb 2026)**: 0.1.1
+- **c7ed445 (25th Feb 2026)**: chore: prepare 0.1.2 release
+- **a835113 (v0.1.2, 25th Feb 2026)**: 0.1.2
+- **7ba4d24 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify editor component and add PayPal donate button to examples
+- **5a678ca (26th Feb 2026)**: Move examples to public and add versioned GitHub Pages builds
+- **e9981f5 (26th Feb 2026)**: Include themes in versioned GitHub Pages snapshots
+- **c8bcd3c (26th Feb 2026)**: Prepare v0.1.3: remove default placeholder text in components
+- **dfc0a90 (v0.1.3, 1st Mar 2026)**: chore: update dist, public, scripts, src
+- **8427eb5 (v0.1.4, 1st Mar 2026)**: chore: sync version files for v0.1.3
+

-<!doctype html>
-<html lang="en">
-<head>
-  <meta charset="utf-8">
-  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
-  <title>Kitsune Commit Review</title>
-  <style>
-    :root{--bg:#0b1220;--fg:#e6edf3;--muted:#9aa4b2;--card:#0f1a2e;--border:#20314d;--add:#183a2a;--del:#3a1c1c;--hl:#f5d90a;}
-    body{margin:0;font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#070b14,#0b1220 35%,#070b14); color:var(--fg);}
-    .wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:28px 18px;}
-    h1{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:.2px;}
-    .muted{color:var(--muted);}
-    .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:340px 1fr;gap:16px;align-items:start;}
-    @media (max-width: 980px){.grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
-    .card{background:rgba(15,26,46,.72); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:14px; padding:14px; box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35);}
-    .mono{font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,monospace;}
-    a{color:#7bdcff;text-decoration:none;}
-    a:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
-    .files{list-style:none;margin:10px 0 0;padding:0;}
-    .files li{margin:6px 0;}
-    .pill{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(123,220,255,.12);border:1px solid rgba(123,220,255,.18); color:#bfefff; font-size:12px;}
-    pre{margin:0;white-space:pre;overflow:auto;line-height:1.35;font-size:12.5px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#050812;}
-    .diffline{display:block;padding:0 12px;}
-    .diffline.add{background:rgba(24,58,42,.45);}
-    .diffline.del{background:rgba(58,28,28,.45);}
-    .diffline.hdr{background:rgba(32,49,77,.35);color:#d0d7de;}
-    .diffline.hunk{background:rgba(32,49,77,.20);color:#c9d1d9;}
-    .filehdr{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin:0 0 10px;}
-    .filehdr h2{margin:0;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;}
-    .msg{white-space:pre-wrap;}
-  </style>

-        <div id="file-dist-components-link-css" class="filehdr" style="margin-top:18px;">

-        <pre class="mono"><span class="diffline hdr">diff --git a/dist/components/link.css b/dist/components/link.css</span>
-<span class="diffline hdr">index 389ae65..c132c6e 100644</span>
-<span class="diffline hdr">--- a/dist/components/link.css</span>
-<span class="diffline hdr">+++ b/dist/components/link.css</span>
-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -1,30 +1,113 @@</span>
-<span class="diffline"> :host {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	--bf-link-font: var(--bf-theme-font-family, inherit);</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 8px);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 10px);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	--bf-link-border-width: var(--bf-theme-border-width, 1px);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	--bf-link-border-style: var(--bf-theme-border-style, solid);</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-border-color: var(--bf-theme-link-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-bg: var(--bf-theme-link-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-border-color: var(--bf-theme-link-border-color, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1) 80%, transparent));</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-bg: var(--bf-theme-link-bg, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	--bf-link-color: var(--bf-theme-link-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.6rem);</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.9rem);</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	--bf-link-transition:</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-		var(--bf-theme-transition-bg, background-color 120ms ease),</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-		var(--bf-theme-transition-color, color 120ms ease),</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease);</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-</span>
-<span class="diffline del">-	display: block;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-muted-color: var(--bf-theme-link-muted-color, var(--bf-theme-text-2, #475569));</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-accent: var(--bf-theme-link-accent, var(--bf-theme-button-primary-bg, #2563eb));</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.7rem);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	--bf-link-transition: background-color 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	display: inline-block;</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	font: var(--bf-link-font);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	color: var(--bf-link-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> }</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-<span class="diffline"> .root {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	display: flex;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	flex-wrap: wrap;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	align-items: center;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	gap: var(--bf-link-gap);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	background: var(--bf-link-bg);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	color: var(--bf-link-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-vertical] {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	flex-direction: column;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	align-items: stretch;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	padding: 0;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='pill'] {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) + 999px);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	padding: 0.35rem;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 85%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='nav'] {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	border-radius: var(--bf-link-radius);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	padding: 0.4rem;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 92%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted(a),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted([role='link']) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	color: var(--bf-link-muted-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	text-decoration: none;</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	padding: var(--bf-link-padding-y) var(--bf-link-padding-x);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) - 2px);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	display: inline-flex;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	align-items: center;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	gap: 0.35rem;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	outline: none;</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);</span>
-<span class="diffline"> }</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	padding: 0;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	border-radius: 0;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	text-decoration: underline;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	text-underline-offset: 0.18em;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-muted-color) 45%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted(a:hover),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 10%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	color: var(--bf-link-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a:hover),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: transparent;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	text-decoration-color: currentColor;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted(a:focus-visible),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted([role='link']:focus-visible) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 35%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted(a[active]),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 16%, transparent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	color: var(--bf-link-color);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	font-weight: 600;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[active]),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	background: transparent;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>

-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+	static observedAttributes = ['variant', 'vertical'];</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	constructor() {</span>

-<span class="diffline"> 		this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });</span>
-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -6,6 +8,7 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	connectedCallback() {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		if (this._initialized) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+			this._sync();</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 			return;</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		}</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		this._initialized = true;</span>
-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -20,8 +23,22 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		root.innerHTML = '&lt;slot&gt;&lt;/slot&gt;';</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-<span class="diffline del">-</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root = root;</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+	}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	attributeChangedCallback() {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._sync();</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	_sync() {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		if (!this._root) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+			return;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		const variant = (this.getAttribute('variant') || 'inline').toLowerCase();</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root.setAttribute('data-variant', ['inline', 'pill', 'nav'].includes(variant) ? variant : 'inline');</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root.toggleAttribute('data-vertical', this.hasAttribute('vertical'));</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	}</span>
-<span class="diffline"> }</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-</pre>

-<span class="diffline"> }</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+}</span>

-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@</span>
-<span class="diffline"> class BfLink extends HTMLElement {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	static observedAttributes = ['variant', 'vertical'];</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	constructor() {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		super();</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });</span>
-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -6,6 +8,7 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	connectedCallback() {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		if (this._initialized) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+			this._sync();</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 			return;</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		}</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		this._initialized = true;</span>
-<span class="diffline hunk">@@ -20,8 +23,22 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		root.innerHTML = '&lt;slot&gt;&lt;/slot&gt;';</span>
-<span class="diffline"> </span>
-<span class="diffline del">-</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root = root;</span>

-<span class="diffline add">+	}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	attributeChangedCallback() {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._sync();</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+	_sync() {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		if (!this._root) {</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+			return;</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		}</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		const variant = (this.getAttribute('variant') || 'inline').toLowerCase();</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root.setAttribute('data-variant', ['inline', 'pill', 'nav'].includes(variant) ? variant : 'inline');</span>
-<span class="diffline add">+		this._root.toggleAttribute('data-vertical', this.hasAttribute('vertical'));</span>
-<span class="diffline"> 	}</span>
-<span class="diffline"> }</span>

-diff --git a/dist/components/link.css b/dist/components/link.css
-index 389ae65..c132c6e 100644
---- a/dist/components/link.css
-+++ b/dist/components/link.css
-@@ -1,30 +1,113 @@
- :host {
- 	--bf-link-font: var(--bf-theme-font-family, inherit);
--	--bf-link-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 8px);
-+	--bf-link-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 10px);
- 	--bf-link-border-width: var(--bf-theme-border-width, 1px);
- 	--bf-link-border-style: var(--bf-theme-border-style, solid);
--	--bf-link-border-color: var(--bf-theme-link-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));
--	--bf-link-bg: var(--bf-theme-link-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));
-+	--bf-link-border-color: var(--bf-theme-link-border-color, color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1) 80%, transparent));
-+	--bf-link-bg: var(--bf-theme-link-bg, transparent);
- 	--bf-link-color: var(--bf-theme-link-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));
--	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.6rem);
--	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.9rem);
--	--bf-link-transition:
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-bg, background-color 120ms ease),
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-color, color 120ms ease),
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease);
--
--	display: block;
-+	--bf-link-muted-color: var(--bf-theme-link-muted-color, var(--bf-theme-text-2, #475569));
-+	--bf-link-accent: var(--bf-theme-link-accent, var(--bf-theme-button-primary-bg, #2563eb));
-+	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
-+	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.7rem);
-+	--bf-link-gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
-+	--bf-link-transition: background-color 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
-+
-+	display: inline-block;
- 	font: var(--bf-link-font);
- 	color: var(--bf-link-color);
- }
- 
- .root {
-+	display: flex;
-+	flex-wrap: wrap;
-+	align-items: center;
-+	gap: var(--bf-link-gap);
- 	background: var(--bf-link-bg);
- 	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-vertical] {
-+	flex-direction: column;
-+	align-items: stretch;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] {
-+	padding: 0;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='pill'] {
-+	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);
-+	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);
-+	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);
-+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) + 999px);
-+	padding: 0.35rem;
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 85%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='nav'] {
- 	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);
- 	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);
- 	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);
- 	border-radius: var(--bf-link-radius);
-+	padding: 0.4rem;
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 92%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']) {
-+	color: var(--bf-link-muted-color);
-+	text-decoration: none;
- 	padding: var(--bf-link-padding-y) var(--bf-link-padding-x);
-+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) - 2px);
-+	display: inline-flex;
-+	align-items: center;
-+	gap: 0.35rem;
-+	outline: none;
- 	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);
- }
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']) {
-+	padding: 0;
-+	border-radius: 0;
-+	text-decoration: underline;
-+	text-underline-offset: 0.18em;
-+	text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-muted-color) 45%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a:hover),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 10%, transparent);
-+	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a:hover),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {
-+	background: transparent;
-+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);
-+	text-decoration-color: currentColor;
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a:focus-visible),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']:focus-visible) {
-+	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 35%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),
-+.root ::slotted(a[active]),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 16%, transparent);
-+	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+	font-weight: 600;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[active]),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {
-+	background: transparent;
-+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);
-+}
-diff --git a/dist/components/link.js b/dist/components/link.js
-index 1a1f805..8db9098 100644
---- a/dist/components/link.js
-+++ b/dist/components/link.js
-@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
- class BfLink extends HTMLElement {
-+	static observedAttributes = ['variant', 'vertical'];
-+
- 	constructor() {
- 		super();
- 		this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
-@@ -6,6 +8,7 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {
- 
- 	connectedCallback() {
- 		if (this._initialized) {
-+			this._sync();
- 			return;
- 		}
- 		this._initialized = true;
-@@ -20,8 +23,22 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {
- 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');
- 		root.innerHTML = '<slot></slot>';
- 
--
- 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);
-+		this._root = root;
-+		this._sync();
-+	}
-+
-+	attributeChangedCallback() {
-+		this._sync();
-+	}
-+
-+	_sync() {
-+		if (!this._root) {
-+			return;
-+		}
-+		const variant = (this.getAttribute('variant') || 'inline').toLowerCase();
-+		this._root.setAttribute('data-variant', ['inline', 'pill', 'nav'].includes(variant) ? variant : 'inline');
-+		this._root.toggleAttribute('data-vertical', this.hasAttribute('vertical'));
- 	}
- }
- 
-diff --git a/dist/index.js b/dist/index.js
-index dd3431e..e65c20f 100644
---- a/dist/index.js
-+++ b/dist/index.js
-@@ -2466,10 +2466,11 @@ var BfLink = class extends HTMLElement {
-   }
-   connectedCallback() {
-     if (this._initialized) {

-index 389ae65..c132c6e 100644
---- a/src/link/link.css

- 	--bf-link-border-width: var(--bf-theme-border-width, 1px);

--	--bf-link-border-color: var(--bf-theme-link-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));

-+	--bf-link-bg: var(--bf-theme-link-bg, transparent);
- 	--bf-link-color: var(--bf-theme-link-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));
--	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.6rem);
--	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.9rem);
--	--bf-link-transition:
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-bg, background-color 120ms ease),
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-color, color 120ms ease),
--		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease);
--
--	display: block;
-+	--bf-link-muted-color: var(--bf-theme-link-muted-color, var(--bf-theme-text-2, #475569));
-+	--bf-link-accent: var(--bf-theme-link-accent, var(--bf-theme-button-primary-bg, #2563eb));
-+	--bf-link-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
-+	--bf-link-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.7rem);
-+	--bf-link-gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
-+	--bf-link-transition: background-color 140ms ease, color 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
-+
-+	display: inline-block;
- 	font: var(--bf-link-font);
- 	color: var(--bf-link-color);
- }
- 
- .root {
-+	display: flex;
-+	flex-wrap: wrap;
-+	align-items: center;
-+	gap: var(--bf-link-gap);
- 	background: var(--bf-link-bg);
- 	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-vertical] {
-+	flex-direction: column;
-+	align-items: stretch;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] {
-+	padding: 0;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='pill'] {
-+	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);
-+	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);
-+	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);
-+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) + 999px);
-+	padding: 0.35rem;
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 85%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='nav'] {
- 	border-width: var(--bf-link-border-width);
- 	border-style: var(--bf-link-border-style);
- 	border-color: var(--bf-link-border-color);
- 	border-radius: var(--bf-link-radius);
-+	padding: 0.4rem;
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff) 92%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']) {
-+	color: var(--bf-link-muted-color);
-+	text-decoration: none;
- 	padding: var(--bf-link-padding-y) var(--bf-link-padding-x);
-+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-link-radius) - 2px);
-+	display: inline-flex;
-+	align-items: center;
-+	gap: 0.35rem;
-+	outline: none;
- 	transition: var(--bf-link-transition);
- }
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']) {
-+	padding: 0;
-+	border-radius: 0;
-+	text-decoration: underline;
-+	text-underline-offset: 0.18em;
-+	text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-muted-color) 45%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a:hover),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 10%, transparent);
-+	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a:hover),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link']:hover) {
-+	background: transparent;
-+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);
-+	text-decoration-color: currentColor;
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a:focus-visible),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link']:focus-visible) {
-+	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 35%, transparent);
-+}
-+
-+.root ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),
-+.root ::slotted(a[active]),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),
-+.root ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {
-+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-link-accent) 16%, transparent);
-+	color: var(--bf-link-color);
-+	font-weight: 600;
-+}
-+
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[aria-current='page']),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted(a[active]),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][aria-current='page']),
-+.root[data-variant='inline'] ::slotted([role='link'][active]) {
-+	background: transparent;
-+	color: var(--bf-link-accent);
-+}

-@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@

-+
- 	constructor() {
- 		super();

-@@ -6,6 +8,7 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {
- 
- 	connectedCallback() {

- 		}
- 		this._initialized = true;
-@@ -20,8 +23,22 @@ class BfLink extends HTMLElement {
- 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');
- 		root.innerHTML = '<slot></slot>';
- 
--
- 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);
-+		this._root = root;
-+		this._sync();
-+	}
-+
-+	attributeChangedCallback() {
-+		this._sync();
-+	}
-+
-+	_sync() {
-+		if (!this._root) {
-+			return;
-+		}
-+		const variant = (this.getAttribute('variant') || 'inline').toLowerCase();
-+		this._root.setAttribute('data-variant', ['inline', 'pill', 'nav'].includes(variant) ? variant : 'inline');
-+		this._root.toggleAttribute('data-vertical', this.hasAttribute('vertical'));
- 	}
- }

 			<ol class="steps" part="steps"></ol>
 			<div class="content" part="content"><slot></slot></div>
 			<div class="actions" part="actions">
 				<button class="prev" type="button" part="prev">Back</button>

dist/components/dropdown.css

back to top 
diff --git a/dist/components/dropdown.css b/dist/components/dropdown.css
index 8baad56..73fb69d 100644
--- a/dist/components/dropdown.css
+++ b/dist/components/dropdown.css
@@ -6,25 +6,149 @@
 	--bf-dropdown-border-color: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));
 	--bf-dropdown-bg: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));
 	--bf-dropdown-color: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));
-	--bf-dropdown-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.6rem);
-	--bf-dropdown-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.9rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-muted: var(--bf-theme-text-2, #475569);
+	--bf-dropdown-accent: var(--bf-theme-button-primary-bg, #2563eb);
+	--bf-dropdown-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.75rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-shadow: 0 14px 28px -18px rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.45);
 	--bf-dropdown-transition:
 		var(--bf-theme-transition-bg, background-color 120ms ease),
 		var(--bf-theme-transition-color, color 120ms ease),
-		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease);
+		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease),
+		transform 120ms ease,
+		opacity 120ms ease;
 
-	display: block;
+	display: inline-block;
 	font: var(--bf-dropdown-font);
 	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	position: relative;
 }
 
 .root {
-	background: var(--bf-dropdown-bg);
+	position: relative;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+}
+
+.toggle {
+	display: inline-flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	gap: 0.45rem;
+	border: 0;
+	border-radius: var(--bf-dropdown-radius);
+	background: transparent;
 	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	padding: 0;
+	cursor: pointer;
+	font: inherit;
+	transition: var(--bf-dropdown-transition);
+}
+
+.toggle:hover {
+	color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 70%, var(--bf-dropdown-color));
+}
+
+.toggle:focus-visible {
+	outline: none;
+	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 36%, transparent);
+}
+
+.toggle-label {
+	display: inline-flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	gap: 0.35rem;
+	min-height: 1.75rem;
+}
+
+.caret {
+	font-size: 0.75rem;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-muted);
+	transition: transform 140ms ease;
+}
+
+.root[data-open='true'] .caret {
+	transform: rotate(180deg);
+}
+
+.menu {
+	position: absolute;
+	min-width: 100%;
+	max-width: 320px;
+	z-index: 60;
 	border-width: var(--bf-dropdown-border-width);
 	border-style: var(--bf-dropdown-border-style);
 	border-color: var(--bf-dropdown-border-color);
-	border-radius: var(--bf-dropdown-radius);
-	padding: var(--bf-dropdown-padding-y) var(--bf-dropdown-padding-x);
+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius) + 2px);
+	background: var(--bf-dropdown-bg);
+	box-shadow: var(--bf-dropdown-shadow);
+	padding: 0.35rem;
+	overflow: auto;
+	max-height: min(340px, 70vh);
+	opacity: 0;
+	transform: translateY(-4px);
+	pointer-events: none;
 	transition: var(--bf-dropdown-transition);
 }
+
+.root[data-open='true'] .menu {
+	opacity: 1;
+	transform: translateY(0);
+	pointer-events: auto;
+}
+
+.root[data-position='bottom-start'] .menu {
+	left: 0;
+	top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='bottom-end'] .menu {
+	right: 0;
+	top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='top-start'] .menu {
+	left: 0;
+	bottom: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='top-end'] .menu {
+	right: 0;
+	bottom: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]),
+.menu ::slotted([item]),
+.menu ::slotted(a),
+.menu ::slotted(button) {
+	display: flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	width: 100%;
+	gap: 0.45rem;
+	border: 0;
+	background: transparent;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	text-decoration: none;
+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius) - 2px);
+	padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
+	cursor: pointer;
+	text-align: left;
+	font: inherit;
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted(*) + ::slotted(*) {
+	margin-top: 0.15rem;
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]:hover),
+.menu ::slotted([item]:hover),
+.menu ::slotted(a:hover),
+.menu ::slotted(button:hover) {
+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 12%, transparent);
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted([item]:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted(a:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted(button:focus-visible) {
+	outline: none;
+	box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 42%, transparent);
+}

dist/components/dropdown.js

back to top 
diff --git a/dist/components/dropdown.js b/dist/components/dropdown.js
index efbaee6..404e364 100644
--- a/dist/components/dropdown.js
+++ b/dist/components/dropdown.js
@@ -1,11 +1,19 @@
 class BfDropdown extends HTMLElement {
+	static observedAttributes = ['open', 'position'];
+
 	constructor() {
 		super();
 		this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
+		this._onToggleClick = this._onToggleClick.bind(this);
+		this._onDocumentClick = this._onDocumentClick.bind(this);
+		this._onKeyDown = this._onKeyDown.bind(this);
+		this._onContentClick = this._onContentClick.bind(this);
+		this._onSlotChange = this._onSlotChange.bind(this);
 	}
 
 	connectedCallback() {
 		if (this._initialized) {
+			this._sync();
 			return;
 		}
 		this._initialized = true;
@@ -18,10 +26,231 @@ class BfDropdown extends HTMLElement {
 		const root = document.createElement('div');
 		root.className = 'root';
 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');
-		root.innerHTML = '<slot></slot>';
-
+		root.innerHTML = `
+			<div class="toggle" part="toggle" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false">
+				<span class="toggle-label"><slot name="trigger">Open</slot></span>
+				<span class="caret" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
+			</div>
+			<div class="menu" part="menu" role="menu">
+				<slot name="content"></slot>
+			</div>
+		`;
 
 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);
+		this._root = root;
+		this._toggle = root.querySelector('.toggle');
+		this._menu = root.querySelector('.menu');
+		this._triggerSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="trigger"]');
+		this._contentSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="content"]');
+
+		this._toggle.addEventListener('click', this._onToggleClick);
+		this._toggle.addEventListener('keydown', this._onKeyDown);
+		this._menu.addEventListener('click', this._onContentClick);
+		this._triggerSlot.addEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		this._contentSlot.addEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		document.addEventListener('click', this._onDocumentClick);
+
+		this._assignSlots();
+		this._decorateItems();
+		this._sync();
+	}
+
+	disconnectedCallback() {
+		document.removeEventListener('click', this._onDocumentClick);
+		if (this._toggle) {
+			this._toggle.removeEventListener('click', this._onToggleClick);
+			this._toggle.removeEventListener('keydown', this._onKeyDown);
+		}
+		if (this._menu) {
+			this._menu.removeEventListener('click', this._onContentClick);
+		}
+		if (this._triggerSlot) {
+			this._triggerSlot.removeEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		}
+		if (this._contentSlot) {
+			this._contentSlot.removeEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		}
+	}
+
+	attributeChangedCallback() {
+		this._sync();
+	}
+
+	open() {
+		this.setAttribute('open', '');
+	}
+
+	close() {
+		this.removeAttribute('open');
+	}
+
+	toggle() {
+		if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			this.close();
+			return;
+		}
+		this.open();
+	}
+
+	_onSlotChange() {
+		this._assignSlots();
+		this._decorateItems();
+	}
+
+	_assignSlots() {
+		const candidates = [...this.children].filter(
+			(element) => element.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE,
+		);
+		if (!candidates.length) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const hasTrigger = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute('slot') === 'trigger');
+		const hasContent = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute('slot') === 'content');
+		if (!hasTrigger) {
+			candidates[0].setAttribute('slot', 'trigger');
+		}
+		if (!hasContent) {
+			for (let i = 1; i < candidates.length; i += 1) {
+				candidates[i].setAttribute('slot', 'content');
+			}
+		}
+	}
+
+	_actionableItems() {
+		const assigned = this._contentSlot?.assignedElements({ flatten: true }) || [];
+		const items = [];
+		for (const element of assigned) {
+			if (element.matches?.('a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]')) {
+				items.push(element);
+			}
+			items.push(
+				...element.querySelectorAll(
+					'a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]',
+				),
+			);
+		}
+		return items;
+	}
+
+	_decorateItems() {
+		const items = this._actionableItems();
+		for (const item of items) {
+			item.setAttribute('data-bf-dropdown-item', '');
+			if (item.hasAttribute('item') && !item.hasAttribute('role')) {
+				item.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem');
+			}
+			if (!item.hasAttribute('tabindex')) {
+				item.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
+			}
+			if (item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled !== 'true') {
+				item.style.display = 'flex';
+				item.style.alignItems = 'center';
+				item.style.width = '100%';
+				item.style.gap = '0.45rem';
+				item.style.border = '0';
+				item.style.background = 'transparent';
+				item.style.borderRadius = '0.4rem';
+				item.style.padding = '0.5rem 0.6rem';
+				item.style.cursor = 'pointer';
+				item.style.textAlign = 'left';
+				item.style.font = 'inherit';
+				item.style.color = 'inherit';
+				item.style.textDecoration = 'none';
+				item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled = 'true';
+			}
+		}
+	}
+
+	_focusFirstItem() {
+		const items = this._actionableItems();
+		const first = items.find((item) => !item.hasAttribute('disabled'));
+		first?.focus();
+	}
+
+	_emitSelect(target) {
+		const value = target.getAttribute('value') || target.textContent?.trim() || '';
+		this.dispatchEvent(
+			new CustomEvent('bf-select', {
+				bubbles: true,
+				composed: true,
+				detail: {
+					id: target.id || '',
+					value,
+				},
+			}),
+		);
+	}
+
+	_onContentClick(event) {
+		const target = event.target instanceof Element
+			? event.target.closest('[data-bf-dropdown-item]')
+			: null;
+		if (!target) {
+			return;
+		}
+		this._emitSelect(target);
+		this.close();
+	}
+
+	_onToggleClick() {
+		this.toggle();
+		if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+		}
+	}
+
+	_onDocumentClick(event) {
+		if (!this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const path = event.composedPath();
+		if (path.includes(this)) {
+			return;
+		}
+		this.close();
+	}
+
+	_onKeyDown(event) {
+		if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
+			event.preventDefault();
+			this.toggle();
+			if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+				requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+			}
+			return;
+		}
+		if (event.key === 'ArrowDown') {
+			event.preventDefault();
+			this.open();
+			requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+			return;
+		}
+		if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+			this.close();
+			this._toggle?.focus();
+		}
+	}
+
+	_position() {
+		const value = (this.getAttribute('position') || 'bottom-start').toLowerCase();
+		if (
+			['bottom-start', 'bottom-end', 'top-start', 'top-end'].includes(value)
+		) {
+			return value;
+		}
+		return 'bottom-start';
+	}
+
+	_sync() {
+		if (!this._root || !this._toggle || !this._menu) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const open = this.hasAttribute('open');
+		this._root.setAttribute('data-open', open ? 'true' : 'false');
+		this._root.setAttribute('data-position', this._position());
+		this._toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
+		this._toggle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
+		this._menu.hidden = !open;
 	}
 }

dist/components/editor.css

back to top 
diff --git a/dist/components/editor.css b/dist/components/editor.css
index bebeff5..451bcd8 100644
--- a/dist/components/editor.css
+++ b/dist/components/editor.css
@@ -3,11 +3,11 @@
 	--bf-editor-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 8px);
 	--bf-editor-border-width: var(--bf-theme-border-width, 1px);
 	--bf-editor-border-style: var(--bf-theme-border-style, solid);
-	--bf-editor-border-color: var(--bf-theme-editor-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));
-	--bf-editor-bg: var(--bf-theme-editor-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));
-	--bf-editor-color: var(--bf-theme-editor-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));
-	--bf-editor-muted: var(--bf-theme-text-2, #64748b);
-	--bf-editor-code-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-editor-bg) 86%, #0f172a 14%);
+	--bf-editor-border-color: var(--bf-theme-editor-border-color, #1f2937);
+	--bf-editor-bg: var(--bf-theme-editor-bg, #000000);
+	--bf-editor-color: var(--bf-theme-editor-color, #f8fafc);
+	--bf-editor-muted: var(--bf-theme-editor-muted, #94a3b8);
+	--bf-editor-code-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-editor-bg) 94%, #111827 6%);
 	--bf-editor-code-color: #e2e8f0;
 
 	display: block;

   constructor() {
     super();
     this.attachShadow({ mode: "open" });
+    this._onToggleClick = this._onToggleClick.bind(this);
+    this._onDocumentClick = this._onDocumentClick.bind(this);
+    this._onKeyDown = this._onKeyDown.bind(this);
+    this._onContentClick = this._onContentClick.bind(this);
+    this._onSlotChange = this._onSlotChange.bind(this);

   connectedCallback() {
     if (this._initialized) {
+      this._sync();
       return;
     }
     this._initialized = true;

%3B%0A%09transition%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-transition)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.toggle%3Ahover%20%7B%0A%09color%3A%20color-mix(in%20srgb%2C%20var(--bf-dropdown-accent)%2070%25%2C%20var(--bf-dropdown-color))%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.toggle%3Afocus-visible%20%7B%0A%09outline%3A%20none%3B%0A%09box-shadow%3A%200%200%200%202px%20color-mix(in%20srgb%2C%20var(--bf-dropdown-accent)%2036%25%2C%20transparent)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.toggle-label%20%7B%0A%09display%3A%20inline-flex%3B%0A%09align-items%3A%20center%3B%0A%09gap%3A%200.35rem%3B%0A%09min-height%3A%201.75rem%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.caret%20%7B%0A%09font-size%3A%200.75rem%3B%0A%09color%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-muted)%3B%0A%09transition%3A%20transform%20140ms%20ease%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-open%3D'true'%5D%20.caret%20%7B%0A%09transform%3A%20rotate(180deg)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.menu%20%7B%0A%09position%3A%20absolute%3B%0A%09min-width%3A%20100%25%3B%0A%09max-width%3A%20320px%3B%0A%09z-index%3A%2060%3B%0A%09border-width%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-border-width)%3B%0A%09border-style%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-border-style)%3B%0A%09border-color%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-border-color)%3B%0A%09border-radius%3A%20calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius)%20%2B%202px)%3B%0A%09background%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-bg)%3B%0A%09box-shadow%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-shadow)%3B%0A%09padding%3A%200.35rem%3B%0A%09overflow%3A%20auto%3B%0A%09max-height%3A%20min(340px%2C%2070vh)%3B%0A%09opacity%3A%200%3B%0A%09transform%3A%20translateY(-4px)%3B%0A%09pointer-events%3A%20none%3B%0A%09transition%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-transition)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-open%3D'true'%5D%20.menu%20%7B%0A%09opacity%3A%201%3B%0A%09transform%3A%20translateY(0)%3B%0A%09pointer-events%3A%20auto%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-position%3D'bottom-start'%5D%20.menu%20%7B%0A%09left%3A%200%3B%0A%09top%3A%20calc(100%25%20%2B%200.35rem)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-position%3D'bottom-end'%5D%20.menu%20%7B%0A%09right%3A%200%3B%0A%09top%3A%20calc(100%25%20%2B%200.35rem)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-position%3D'top-start'%5D%20.menu%20%7B%0A%09left%3A%200%3B%0A%09bottom%3A%20calc(100%25%20%2B%200.35rem)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.root%5Bdata-position%3D'top-end'%5D%20.menu%20%7B%0A%09right%3A%200%3B%0A%09bottom%3A%20calc(100%25%20%2B%200.35rem)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bdata-bf-dropdown-item%5D)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bitem%5D)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(a)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(button)%20%7B%0A%09display%3A%20flex%3B%0A%09align-items%3A%20center%3B%0A%09width%3A%20100%25%3B%0A%09gap%3A%200.45rem%3B%0A%09border%3A%200%3B%0A%09background%3A%20transparent%3B%0A%09color%3A%20var(--bf-dropdown-color)%3B%0A%09text-decoration%3A%20none%3B%0A%09border-radius%3A%20calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius)%20-%202px)%3B%0A%09padding%3A%200.5rem%200.6rem%3B%0A%09cursor%3A%20pointer%3B%0A%09text-align%3A%20left%3B%0A%09font%3A%20inherit%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(*)%20%2B%20%3A%3Aslotted(*)%20%7B%0A%09margin-top%3A%200.15rem%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bdata-bf-dropdown-item%5D%3Ahover)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bitem%5D%3Ahover)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(a%3Ahover)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(button%3Ahover)%20%7B%0A%09background%3A%20color-mix(in%20srgb%2C%20var(--bf-dropdown-accent)%2012%25%2C%20transparent)%3B%0A%7D%0A%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bdata-bf-dropdown-item%5D%3Afocus-visible)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(%5Bitem%5D%3Afocus-visible)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(a%3Afocus-visible)%2C%0A.menu%20%3A%3Aslotted(button%3Afocus-visible)%20%7B%0A%09outline%3A%20none%3B%0A%09box-shadow%3A%20inset%200%200%200%201px%20color-mix(in%20srgb%2C%20var(--bf-dropdown-accent)%2042%25%2C%20transparent)%3B%0A%7D%0A", import.meta.url);
     const link = document.createElement("link");
     link.rel = "stylesheet";
     link.href = cssUrl.href;
     const root = document.createElement("div");
     root.className = "root";
     root.setAttribute("part", "root");
-    root.innerHTML = "<slot></slot>";
+    root.innerHTML = `
+			<div class="toggle" part="toggle" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false">
+				<span class="toggle-label"><slot name="trigger">Open</slot></span>
+				<span class="caret" aria-hidden="true">\u25BE</span>
+			</div>
+			<div class="menu" part="menu" role="menu">
+				<slot name="content"></slot>
+			</div>
+		`;
     this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);
+    this._root = root;
+    this._toggle = root.querySelector(".toggle");
+    this._menu = root.querySelector(".menu");
+    this._triggerSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="trigger"]');
+    this._contentSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="content"]');
+    this._toggle.addEventListener("click", this._onToggleClick);
+    this._toggle.addEventListener("keydown", this._onKeyDown);
+    this._menu.addEventListener("click", this._onContentClick);
+    this._triggerSlot.addEventListener("slotchange", this._onSlotChange);
+    this._contentSlot.addEventListener("slotchange", this._onSlotChange);
+    document.addEventListener("click", this._onDocumentClick);
+    this._assignSlots();
+    this._decorateItems();
+    this._sync();
+  }
+  disconnectedCallback() {
+    document.removeEventListener("click", this._onDocumentClick);
+    if (this._toggle) {
+      this._toggle.removeEventListener("click", this._onToggleClick);
+      this._toggle.removeEventListener("keydown", this._onKeyDown);
+    }
+    if (this._menu) {
+      this._menu.removeEventListener("click", this._onContentClick);
+    }
+    if (this._triggerSlot) {
+      this._triggerSlot.removeEventListener("slotchange", this._onSlotChange);
+    }
+    if (this._contentSlot) {
+      this._contentSlot.removeEventListener("slotchange", this._onSlotChange);
+    }
+  }
+  attributeChangedCallback() {
+    this._sync();
+  }
+  open() {
+    this.setAttribute("open", "");
+  }
+  close() {
+    this.removeAttribute("open");
+  }
+  toggle() {
+    if (this.hasAttribute("open")) {
+      this.close();
+      return;
+    }
+    this.open();
+  }
+  _onSlotChange() {
+    this._assignSlots();
+    this._decorateItems();
+  }
+  _assignSlots() {
+    const candidates = [...this.children].filter(
+      (element) => element.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE
+    );
+    if (!candidates.length) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const hasTrigger = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute("slot") === "trigger");
+    const hasContent = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute("slot") === "content");
+    if (!hasTrigger) {
+      candidates[0].setAttribute("slot", "trigger");
+    }
+    if (!hasContent) {
+      for (let i = 1; i < candidates.length; i += 1) {
+        candidates[i].setAttribute("slot", "content");
+      }
+    }
+  }
+  _actionableItems() {
+    const assigned = this._contentSlot?.assignedElements({ flatten: true }) || [];
+    const items = [];
+    for (const element of assigned) {
+      if (element.matches?.('a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]')) {
+        items.push(element);
+      }
+      items.push(
+        ...element.querySelectorAll(
+          'a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]'
+        )
+      );
+    }
+    return items;
+  }
+  _decorateItems() {
+    const items = this._actionableItems();
+    for (const item of items) {
+      item.setAttribute("data-bf-dropdown-item", "");
+      if (item.hasAttribute("item") && !item.hasAttribute("role")) {
+        item.setAttribute("role", "menuitem");
+      }
+      if (!item.hasAttribute("tabindex")) {
+        item.setAttribute("tabindex", "0");
+      }
+      if (item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled !== "true") {
+        item.style.display = "flex";
+        item.style.alignItems = "center";
+        item.style.width = "100%";
+        item.style.gap = "0.45rem";
+        item.style.border = "0";
+        item.style.background = "transparent";
+        item.style.borderRadius = "0.4rem";
+        item.style.padding = "0.5rem 0.6rem";
+        item.style.cursor = "pointer";
+        item.style.textAlign = "left";
+        item.style.font = "inherit";
+        item.style.color = "inherit";
+        item.style.textDecoration = "none";
+        item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled = "true";
+      }
+    }
+  }
+  _focusFirstItem() {
+    const items = this._actionableItems();
+    const first = items.find((item) => !item.hasAttribute("disabled"));
+    first?.focus();
+  }
+  _emitSelect(target) {
+    const value = target.getAttribute("value") || target.textContent?.trim() || "";
+    this.dispatchEvent(
+      new CustomEvent("bf-select", {
+        bubbles: true,
+        composed: true,
+        detail: {
+          id: target.id || "",
+          value
+        }
+      })
+    );
+  }
+  _onContentClick(event) {
+    const target = event.target instanceof Element ? event.target.closest("[data-bf-dropdown-item]") : null;
+    if (!target) {
+      return;
+    }
+    this._emitSelect(target);
+    this.close();
+  }
+  _onToggleClick() {
+    this.toggle();
+    if (this.hasAttribute("open")) {
+      requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+    }
+  }
+  _onDocumentClick(event) {
+    if (!this.hasAttribute("open")) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const path = event.composedPath();
+    if (path.includes(this)) {
+      return;
+    }
+    this.close();
+  }
+  _onKeyDown(event) {
+    if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      this.toggle();
+      if (this.hasAttribute("open")) {
+        requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+      }
+      return;
+    }
+    if (event.key === "ArrowDown") {
+      event.preventDefault();
+      this.open();
+      requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+      return;
+    }
+    if (event.key === "Escape") {
+      this.close();
+      this._toggle?.focus();
+    }
+  }
+  _position() {
+    const value = (this.getAttribute("position") || "bottom-start").toLowerCase();
+    if (["bottom-start", "bottom-end", "top-start", "top-end"].includes(value)) {
+      return value;
+    }
+    return "bottom-start";
+  }
+  _sync() {
+    if (!this._root || !this._toggle || !this._menu) {
+      return;
+    }
+    const open = this.hasAttribute("open");
+    this._root.setAttribute("data-open", open ? "true" : "false");
+    this._root.setAttribute("data-position", this._position());
+    this._toggle.setAttribute("aria-expanded", String(open));
+    this._toggle.setAttribute("aria-pressed", String(open));
+    this._menu.hidden = !open;
   }
 };
+__publicField(BfDropdown, "observedAttributes", ["open", "position"]);
 customElements.define("bf-dropdown", BfDropdown);
 
 // src/edge/edge.js

kitsune.yaml

back to top 
diff --git a/kitsune.yaml b/kitsune.yaml
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..0cc63fc
--- /dev/null
+++ b/kitsune.yaml
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# Generated by Kitsune
+version: 0.1.4
+ai:
+  # Base URL for model downloads used by `kitsune ai setup` and first-run auto setup.
+  models_base_url: https://github.com/SamuelDBines/kitsune-models/releases/latest/download/
+  # Default model id (gpt2|qwen2|phi3-mini)
+  default_model: qwen2
+security:
+  # Optional: ignore security scan findings by path or rule.
+  # ignore_paths supports glob patterns, including **.
+  ignore_paths: []
+  # ignore_rules values come from `kitsune security scan` output (e.g. github_token, stripe_secret_key).
+  ignore_rules: []
+release:
+  out_dir: .kitsune/releases
+  include_source: false
+  changelog:
+    out_dir: public/versions
+    formats: [html]
+  artifacts:
+    - type: node
+      enabled: false
+      build: npm ci && npm run build
+      outputs_glob: dist/**/*
+    - label: 'Bareframe JS'
+      url: 'https://samueldbines.github.io/bareframe/versions/{{ version }}/bareframe.min.js'
+    - label: 'Theme: Simple'
+      url: 'https://samueldbines.github.io/bareframe/versions/{{ version }}/themes/simple.css'
+    - label: 'Theme: Future'
+      url: 'https://samueldbines.github.io/bareframe/versions/{{ version }}/themes/future.css'

 {
-  "name": "bareframe",
-  "version": "0.1.3",
   "description": "Lightweight, dependency-free Web Components for reusable app UI.",
-  "type": "module",
-  "main": "./dist/index.js",
-  "module": "./dist/index.js",
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "esbuild": "^0.27.3"
+  },

     ".": "./dist/index.js",

-    "./manifest.json": "./dist/manifest.json"
+    "./manifest.json": "./dist/manifest.json",

   },
   "files": [
     "dist",
     "README.md"
   ],
-  "scripts": {
-    "build": "node ./scripts/build.mjs",
-    "watch": "node --watch --watch-path=src --watch-path=themes --watch-path=scripts ./scripts/build.mjs",
-    "serve": "cd public && ln -sfn ../src src && ln -sfn ../themes themes && ln -sfn ../dist dist && python3 -m http.server 8088",
-    "generate:index": "node ./scripts/generate-index.mjs",
-    "prepack": "npm run build",
-    "pack:preview": "npm pack --dry-run",
-    "generate:examples": "node ./scripts/generate-examples.mjs",
-    "generate:versions": "node ./scripts/generate-versions.mjs"
-  },
   "keywords": [
     "web-components",
     "custom-elements",
@@ -35,7 +23,19 @@
     "bareframe"
   ],
   "license": "MIT",
-  "devDependencies": {
-    "esbuild": "^0.27.3"
-  }
+  "main": "./dist/index.js",
+  "module": "./dist/index.js",
+  "name": "bareframe",
+  "scripts": {
+    "build": "node ./scripts/build.mjs",
+    "generate:examples": "node ./scripts/generate-examples.mjs",
+    "generate:index": "node ./scripts/generate-index.mjs",
+    "generate:versions": "node ./scripts/generate-versions.mjs",
+    "pack:preview": "npm pack --dry-run",
+    "prepack": "npm run build",
+    "serve": "cd public \u0026\u0026 ln -sfn ../src src \u0026\u0026 ln -sfn ../themes themes \u0026\u0026 ln -sfn ../dist dist \u0026\u0026 python3 -m http.server 8088",
+    "watch": "node --watch --watch-path=src --watch-path=themes --watch-path=scripts ./scripts/build.mjs"
+  },
+  "type": "module",
+  "version": "0.1.4"
 }

--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/aurora.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,47 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='aurora'] {
-	color-scheme: light;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 14px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.58rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.95rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.96;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 0;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #7c3aed;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #fdf8ff;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #f4f4ff;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #2d1b44;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #5c4b7a;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #d5c9eb;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #7c3aed;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #6d28d9;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #3f2a5f;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #b9a8dd;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #f1eaff;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #e8ddff;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #ddd0fb;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #5b3d93;
-	--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-typography-line-height: 1.5;
-	--bf-theme-typography-display-size: 2.28rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h1-size: 1.88rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h2-size: 1.48rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h3-size: 1.14rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-body-size: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-caption-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-label-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-code-size: 0.9rem;
-}

public/versions/0.1.2/themes/desert.css

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/desert.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/desert.css
deleted file mode 100644
index 042cc01..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/desert.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,37 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='desert'] {
-	color-scheme: light;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 10px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.55rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.9rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.95;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 0;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #b45309;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #fff8ec;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #f8ecd8;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #4a2d16;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #80583d;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #d8b78f;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #c26b2f;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #fff7ef;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #9a4f1d;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #fffaf1;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #5d3a21;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #c9a278;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #f4e0c1;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #edd1a7;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #e3be8a;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #7c4a22;
