+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,47 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='future'] {
-	color-scheme: dark;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Helvetica Neue', system-ui, sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 12px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.6rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.97;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #22d3ee;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #070b14;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #0d1322;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #e8f3ff;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #8aa3c2;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #26364d;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #00bcd4;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #03131a;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #06b6d4;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #0d1322;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #d5e6ff;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #2f4565;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #0f1a2d;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #14233c;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #1a2c49;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #8ddfff;
-	--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-typography-line-height: 1.5;
-	--bf-theme-typography-display-size: 2.3rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h1-size: 1.9rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h2-size: 1.5rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h3-size: 1.15rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-body-size: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-caption-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-label-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-code-size: 0.9rem;
-}

public/versions/0.1.2/themes/layout.css

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/layout.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/layout.css
deleted file mode 100644
index 134c3e2..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/layout.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,191 +0,0 @@
-[row] {
-	display: flex;
-	flex-direction: row;
-	align-items: center;
-	justify-content: flex-start;
-	flex-wrap: wrap;
-	gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem);
-}
-
-[row='left'] { justify-content: flex-start; }
-[row='center'] { justify-content: center; }
-[row='right'] { justify-content: flex-end; }
-
-[stack] {
-	display: grid;
-	gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem);
-}
-
-[stack='xs'] { gap: calc(var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem) * 0.5); }
-[stack='sm'] { gap: calc(var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem) * 0.75); }
-[stack='md'] { gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem); }
-[stack='lg'] { gap: calc(var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem) * 1.5); }
-[stack='xl'] { gap: calc(var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem) * 2); }
-
-[stack][inline] {
-	display: inline-grid;
-}
-
-[col] {
-	display: flex;
-	flex-direction: column;
-	justify-content: flex-start;
-	min-width: 0;
-	flex: 1 1 0;
-	gap: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.55rem);
-}
-
-[col='top'] { justify-content: flex-start; }
-[col='center'] { justify-content: center; }
-[col='bottom'] { justify-content: flex-end; }
-
-[col='1'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 1); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 1); }
-[col='2'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 2); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 2); }
-[col='3'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 3); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 3); }
-[col='4'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 4); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 4); }
-[col='5'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 5); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 5); }
-[col='6'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 6); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 6); }
-[col='7'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 7); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 7); }
-[col='8'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 8); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 8); }
-[col='9'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 9); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 9); }
-[col='10'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 10); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 10); }
-[col='11'] { flex: 0 0 calc(100% / 12 * 11); max-width: calc(100% / 12 * 11); }
-[col='12'] { flex: 0 0 100%; max-width: 100%; }
-
-[typography],
-[display],
-[h1],
-[h2],
-[h3],
-[body],
-[caption],
-[label],
-[code] {
-	color: var(--bf-theme-typography-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #111827));
-	font-family: var(--bf-theme-font-family, inherit);
-	line-height: var(--bf-theme-typography-line-height, 1.45);
-	letter-spacing: var(--bf-theme-typography-letter-spacing, 0);
-}
-
-[typography='display'],
-[display] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-display-size, 2.25rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-display-weight, 700);
-	line-height: 1.2;
-}
-
-[typography='h1'],
-[h1] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-h1-size, 1.75rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-h1-weight, 700);
-	line-height: 1.25;
-}
-
-[typography='h2'],
-[h2] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-h2-size, 1.375rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-h2-weight, 700);
-	line-height: 1.3;
-}
-
-[typography='h3'],
-[h3] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-h3-size, 1.125rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-h3-weight, 600);
-	line-height: 1.35;
-}
-
-[typography='body'],
-[body] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-body-size, 1rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-body-weight, 400);
-}
-
-[typography='caption'],
-[caption] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-caption-size, 0.875rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-caption-weight, 400);
-	color: var(--bf-theme-text-2, #4b5563);
-}
-
-[typography='label'],
-[label] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-label-size, 0.875rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-label-weight, 600);
-}
-
-[typography='code'],
-[code] {
-	font-size: var(--bf-theme-typography-code-size, 0.9rem);
-	font-weight: var(--bf-theme-typography-code-weight, 500);
-	font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono',
-		'Courier New', monospace;
-	background: var(--bf-theme-surface-2, #f3f4f6);
-	padding: 0.1rem 0.3rem;
-	border-radius: 4px;
-}
-
-[sticky] {
-	position: sticky;
-	z-index: var(--bf-theme-z-sticky, 100);
-}
-
-[fixed] {
-	position: fixed;
-	left: 0;
-	right: 0;
-	z-index: var(--bf-theme-z-fixed, 200);
-}
-
-[header][sticky],
-[header][fixed] {
-	top: 0;
-	bottom: auto;
-}
-
-[footer][sticky],
-[footer][fixed] {
-	bottom: 0;
-	top: auto;
-}
-
-[table] {
-	display: block;
-	width: 100%;
-	overflow-x: auto;
-	border: 1px solid var(--bf-theme-border-1, #d1d5db);
-	border-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 8px);
-	background: var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff);
-}
-
-[table][dense] [th],
-[table][dense] [td] {
-	padding: 0.38rem 0.5rem;
-}
-
-[thead] { display: table-header-group; }
-[tbody] { display: table-row-group; }
-[tr] { display: table-row; }
-
-[th],
-[td] {
-	display: table-cell;
-	padding: 0.52rem 0.7rem;
-	vertical-align: middle;
-	text-align: left;
-	border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bf-theme-border-1, #d1d5db);
-}
-
-[th] {
-	font-weight: 700;
-	color: var(--bf-theme-text-1, #111827);
-	background: var(--bf-theme-surface-2, #f3f4f6);
-}
-
-[tbody] [tr]:nth-child(even) [td] {
-	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-theme-surface-2, #f3f4f6) 50%, transparent);
-}
-
-[tbody] [tr]:last-child [td] {
-	border-bottom: 0;
-}

diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/matrix.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/matrix.css
deleted file mode 100644
index 25305f8..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/matrix.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,37 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='matrix'] {
-	color-scheme: dark;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Courier New', 'Lucida Console', monospace;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 4px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.5rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.85rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.98;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 0;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #22c55e;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #070c09;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #0e1712;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #90f7b8;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #56c27f;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #1f6b3a;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #2adb72;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #04120b;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #21b95f;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #0e1712;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #90f7b8;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #1f6b3a;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #102117;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #153121;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #1b402a;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #6df2a1;
-}

public/versions/0.1.2/themes/modern.css

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/modern.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/modern.css
deleted file mode 100644
index fe6d3e6..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/modern.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,64 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='modern'] {
-	color-scheme: light dark;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Inter', 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 14px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.6rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.97;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #60a5fa;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #f3f6fb;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #0b1220;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #475569;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #cbd5e1;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #0ea5e9;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #f8fafc;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #0284c7;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #0f172a;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #94a3b8;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #eef2ff;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #e0e7ff;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #dbeafe;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #334155;
-	--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-typography-line-height: 1.5;
-	--bf-theme-typography-display-size: 2.35rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h1-size: 1.85rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h2-size: 1.45rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h3-size: 1.15rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-body-size: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-caption-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-label-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-code-size: 0.9rem;
-}
-
-@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
-	:root:not([data-bf-theme]),
-	[data-bf-theme='modern'] {
-		--bf-theme-surface-1: #0b1220;
-		--bf-theme-surface-2: #111827;
-		--bf-theme-text-1: #e2e8f0;
-		--bf-theme-text-2: #94a3b8;
-		--bf-theme-border-1: #334155;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #0f172a;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #cbd5e1;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #334155;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #172033;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #1f2b44;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #1e293b;
-	}
-}

-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='retro'] {
-	color-scheme: light;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Courier New', 'Lucida Console', monospace;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.5rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.85rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.94;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 0;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: dashed;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #22c55e;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #fffbe6;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #fef3c7;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #1f2937;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #92400e;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #d97706;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #f97316;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #111827;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #9a3412;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #fffbe6;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #7c2d12;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #d97706;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #fde68a;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #fcd34d;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #fdba74;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #78350f;
-	--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-typography-line-height: 1.4;
-	--bf-theme-typography-display-size: 2.2rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h1-size: 1.75rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h2-size: 1.35rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h3-size: 1.1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-body-size: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-caption-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-label-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-code-size: 0.9rem;
-}

public/versions/0.1.2/themes/sunrise.css

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/sunrise.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/sunrise.css
deleted file mode 100644
index 5511de9..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/sunrise.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,37 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='sunrise'] {
-	color-scheme: light;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Avenir Next', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 12px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.56rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.92rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.95;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 0;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #ea580c;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #fff8f2;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #ffeede;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #5a2d0c;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #8d5a34;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #e4b08a;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #f97316;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #fff7f2;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #ea580c;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #fffaf5;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #5a2d0c;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #d79a6f;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #ffe3c9;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #ffd4ad;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #ffc695;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: #9a4e19;
-}

public/versions/0.1.2/themes/system.css

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/system.css b/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/system.css
deleted file mode 100644
index f3a1a75..0000000
--- a/public/versions/0.1.2/themes/system.css
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,411 +0,0 @@
-@import './layout.css';
-
-:root,
-[data-bf-theme='system'] {
-	color-scheme: light dark;
-
-	--bf-theme-font-family: 'Inter', 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
-	--bf-theme-border-width: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-border-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-radius-md: 8px;
-	--bf-theme-space-2: 0.55rem;
-	--bf-theme-space-3: 0.95rem;
-	--bf-theme-cursor-button: pointer;
-	--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.98;
-	--bf-theme-active-translate-y: 1px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-width: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-style: solid;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #9ca3af;
-	--bf-theme-focus-ring-offset: 2px;
-	--bf-theme-surface-1: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-surface-2: #f3f4f6;
-	--bf-theme-text-1: #111827;
-	--bf-theme-text-2: #4b5563;
-	--bf-theme-border-1: #d1d5db;
-
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #1f2937;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #1f2937;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #ffffff;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #111827;
-	--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #d1d5db;
-
-	--bf-theme-accordion-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-2);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #f1f5f9;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #eff6ff;
-	--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-panel-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: var(--bf-theme-text-2);
-	--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-typography-line-height: 1.45;
-	--bf-theme-typography-display-size: 2.25rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h1-size: 1.75rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h2-size: 1.375rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-h3-size: 1.125rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-body-size: 1rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-caption-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-label-size: 0.875rem;
-	--bf-theme-typography-code-size: 0.9rem;
-	/* Bareframe component defaults */
-	--bf-theme-wizard-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-wizard-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-wizard-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-virtual-list-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-virtual-list-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-virtual-list-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-video-player-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-video-player-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-video-player-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-upload-dropzone-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-upload-dropzone-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-upload-dropzone-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-treemap-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-treemap-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-treemap-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-tree-view-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-tree-view-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-tree-view-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-tooltip-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-tooltip-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-tooltip-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-toolbar-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-toolbar-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-toolbar-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-toggle-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-toggle-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-toggle-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-toast-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-toast-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-toast-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-timeline-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-timeline-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	--bf-theme-timeline-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-	--bf-theme-textfield-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-	--bf-theme-textfield-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);

-@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
-	:root,
-	[data-bf-theme='system'] {
-		--bf-theme-opacity-hover: 0.95;
-		--bf-theme-focus-ring-color: #9ca3af;
-		--bf-theme-surface-1: #111827;
-		--bf-theme-surface-2: #0f172a;
-		--bf-theme-text-1: #e2e8f0;
-		--bf-theme-text-2: #94a3b8;
-		--bf-theme-border-1: #334155;
-
-		--bf-theme-button-primary-bg: #e5e7eb;
-		--bf-theme-button-primary-color: #111827;
-		--bf-theme-button-primary-border-color: #e5e7eb;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-bg: #0f172a;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-color: #93c5fd;
-		--bf-theme-button-secondary-border-color: #334155;
-
-		--bf-theme-accordion-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-		--bf-theme-accordion-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-		--bf-theme-accordion-border-color: var(--bf-theme-border-1);
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-bg: #111827;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-hover-bg: #1f2937;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-open-bg: #172554;
-		--bf-theme-accordion-trigger-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-		--bf-theme-accordion-panel-bg: var(--bf-theme-surface-1);
-		--bf-theme-accordion-chevron-color: var(--bf-theme-text-2);
-		--bf-theme-typography-color: var(--bf-theme-text-1);
-	}
-}

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/assets/kitsune-docs.css b/public/versions/assets/kitsune-docs.css
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f457c1e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/public/versions/assets/kitsune-docs.css
@@ -0,0 +1,206 @@
+:root {
+  --ks-max: 1060px;
+}
+
+.ks-brand {
+  display: inline-flex;
+  align-items: center;
+  gap: 10px;
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.ks-logo {
+  width: 36px;
+  height: 36px;
+  border-radius: 10px;
+  display: block;
+}
+
+.ks-page {
+  max-width: var(--ks-max);
+  padding-top: 24px;
+  padding-bottom: 48px;
+}
+
+.ks-hero {
+  margin: 18px 0 18px;
+}
+
+.ks-kicker {
+  margin: 0 0 6px;
+  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
+  text-transform: uppercase;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.7;
+}
+
+.ks-meta {
+  margin: 8px 0 0;
+  opacity: 0.8;
+}
+
+.ks-dot {
+  padding: 0 8px;
+}
+
+.ks-grid {
+  display: grid;
+  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  gap: 14px;
+  margin: 14px 0;
+}
+
+@media (min-width: 900px) {
+  .ks-grid {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
+  }
+}
+
+.ks-card {
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
+  border-radius: 14px;
+  padding: 16px;
+  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
+  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
+}
+
+.ks-muted {
+  opacity: 0.75;
+}
+
+.ks-pre {
+  white-space: pre-wrap;
+  background: rgba(10, 14, 22, 0.95);
+  color: rgba(245, 255, 252, 0.92);
+  border-radius: 12px;
+  padding: 12px;
+  overflow: auto;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  line-height: 1.45;
+}
+
+.ks-changes {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ks-changes li {
+  padding: 12px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
+}
+
+.ks-changes li:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-change-head {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 10px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  align-items: center;
+  font-size: 12px;
+  opacity: 0.85;
+}
+
+.ks-sha {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.ks-change-body {
+  margin-top: 6px;
+  font-size: 14px;
+}
+
+.ks-tag-pill {
+  padding: 3px 8px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
+  font-size: 12px;
+}
+
+.ks-tags {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+}
+
+.ks-tag {
+  display: inline-block;
+  padding: 4px 8px;
+  border-radius: 999px;
+  border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
+}
+
+.ks-tag-num {
+  opacity: 0.75;
+  padding-left: 4px;
+}
+
+.ks-downloads {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 10px 0 0;
+}
+
+.ks-downloads li {
+  display: flex;
+  gap: 8px;
+  align-items: center;
+  flex-wrap: wrap;
+  padding: 6px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
+}
+
+.ks-downloads li:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-link {
+  text-decoration: none;
+  font-weight: 650;
+}
+
+.ks-sha-link {
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.ks-sha-link:hover .ks-sha {
+  text-decoration: underline;
+}
+
+.ks-versions {
+  list-style: none;
+  padding: 0;
+  margin: 0;
+}
+
+.ks-version-link {
+  display: flex;
+  justify-content: space-between;
+  gap: 10px;
+  padding: 10px 0;
+  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
+  text-decoration: none;
+}
+
+.ks-version-link:first-child {
+  border-top: none;
+}
+
+.ks-version {
+  font-weight: 700;
+}
+
+.ks-divider {
+  height: 1px;
+  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
+  margin: 18px 0 12px;
+}
+
+.ks-footer {
+  margin-top: 16px;
+}

public/versions/assets/kitsune-logo.svg

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/assets/kitsune-logo.svg b/public/versions/assets/kitsune-logo.svg
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..7f324ca
--- /dev/null
+++ b/public/versions/assets/kitsune-logo.svg
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" role="img" aria-label="Kitsune fox logo">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#12192a"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#060a13"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+    <linearGradient id="fur" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
+      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffb25a"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#f47a2b"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+  <rect width="512" height="512" rx="96" fill="url(#bg)"/>
+
+  <polygon points="110,152 214,118 176,236" fill="url(#fur)"/>
+  <polygon points="402,152 298,118 336,236" fill="url(#fur)"/>
+  <polygon points="146,168 203,148 182,214" fill="#ffd6a4" opacity=".86"/>
+  <polygon points="366,168 309,148 330,214" fill="#ffd6a4" opacity=".86"/>
+
+  <path d="M256 146
+           C188 146 136 196 136 260
+           C136 336 194 390 256 412
+           C318 390 376 336 376 260
+           C376 196 324 146 256 146z" fill="url(#fur)"/>
+
+  <path d="M256 180
+           C212 180 176 216 176 264
+           C176 312 212 350 256 368
+           C300 350 336 312 336 264
+           C336 216 300 180 256 180z" fill="#fff4e2"/>
+
+  <path d="M196 246 L256 294 L316 246 L256 226 Z" fill="#20212e"/>
+  <circle cx="224" cy="252" r="11" fill="#20212e"/>
+  <circle cx="288" cy="252" r="11" fill="#20212e"/>
+  <path d="M246 308 Q256 320 266 308" fill="none" stroke="#20212e" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round"/>
+
+  <text x="256" y="470" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Avenir Next, Segoe UI, sans-serif" font-size="48" font-weight="700" fill="#ffb25a" letter-spacing="4">KITSUNE</text>
+</svg>

diff --git a/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.html b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.html
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e5cc1dd
--- /dev/null
+++ b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.html
@@ -0,0 +1,177 @@
+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8" />
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
+    <title>v0.1.1 · Kitsune Changelog</title>
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/themes/simple.css" />
+    <script defer src="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/bareframe.min.js"></script>
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/kitsune-docs.css" />
+  </head>
+  <body class="bf">
+    <header class="bf-nav">
+      <div class="bf-container bf-row bf-between bf-center">
+        <a class="bf-brand ks-brand" href="../index.html">
+          <img src="../assets/kitsune-logo.svg" alt="Kitsune logo" class="ks-logo" />
+          <span>Kitsune</span>
+        </a>
+        <nav class="bf-row bf-gap-sm">
+          <a href="../index.html">Versions</a>
+          <a href="../../../docs/index.html">Docs</a>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+    </header>
+
+    <main class="bf-container ks-page">
+      <section class="ks-hero">
+        <p class="ks-kicker">Changelog</p>
+        <h1>v0.1.1</h1>
+        <p class="ks-meta">
+          Range: <code>e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110</code> → <code>v0.1.1</code>
+          <span class="ks-dot">·</span>
+          Commits: <code>e5d49af</code> → <code>1ba5012</code>
+        </p>
+      </section>
+
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Changes</h2>
+        <ul class="ks-changes">
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/c3c6245a06d91d1dce0a5ff1466919d36d0521ab"><code class="ks-sha">c3c6245</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/24291142b96af40582cdac0a7c733798266565bf"><code class="ks-sha">2429114</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/876deb810bbacf540b72c98bdca4b30c32f9b3e7"><code class="ks-sha">876deb8</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/4a1bd270d793a35d6a39736b6e5360abdebe6876"><code class="ks-sha">4a1bd27</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/f1ebac4ca9052dfab385b29788acee6aa484f2ea"><code class="ks-sha">f1ebac4</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/a3e6359b8764fd683cb35de4ced0d1668215ac7c"><code class="ks-sha">a3e6359</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/2401e63c0b5a0fc5aad78fbe4308bcc598e7852d"><code class="ks-sha">2401e63</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/52f048bdfd7fb60f73cf2ad8bd6b796a7f70085f"><code class="ks-sha">52f048b</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/31161d80e2ab36ece01999af6127576dbca017c0"><code class="ks-sha">31161d8</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">chore: prep release</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/1ba5012a8f4775e0919f619b076358f1abcd6a72"><code class="ks-sha">1ba5012</code></a>
+              
+              
+                <span class="ks-tag-pill">v0.1.1</span>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">0.1.1</div>
+          </li>
+          
+        </ul>
+      </section>
+
+      
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Downloads</h2>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Binaries for v0.1.1:</p>
+        <ul class="ks-downloads">
+          
+          <li>
+            <a class="ks-link" href=""></a>
+            <span class="ks-muted">()</span>
+          </li>
+          
+        </ul>
+      </section>
+      
+
+      <footer class="ks-footer">
+        <div class="ks-divider"></div>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Generated by <strong>Kitsune</strong>.</p>
+      </footer>
+    </main>
+  </body>
+</html>

public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.markdown

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.markdown b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.markdown
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e5ee1d0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.markdown
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+# Kitsune Changelog: v0.1.1
+
+Range: `e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110` -> `v0.1.1`
+
+- **c3c6245 (25th Feb 2026)**: Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging
+- **2429114 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment
+- **876deb8 (25th Feb 2026)**: Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest
+- **4a1bd27 (25th Feb 2026)**: Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos
+- **f1ebac4 (25th Feb 2026)**: Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples
+- **a3e6359 (25th Feb 2026)**: Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples
+- **2401e63 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata
+- **52f048b (25th Feb 2026)**: Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos
+- **31161d8 (25th Feb 2026)**: chore: prep release
+- **1ba5012 (v0.1.1, 25th Feb 2026)**: 0.1.1
+

public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.txt

diff --git a/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.txt b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.txt
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..f34f088
--- /dev/null
+++ b/public/versions/v0.1.1/changelog.txt
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+Change log from e5d49af65d70e3265648149ab024a4cb9a3f5110 to v0.1.1
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: c3c6245a06d91d1dce0a5ff1466919d36d0521ab
+message: Build out bareframe component library, themes, examples, and npm packaging
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 24291142b96af40582cdac0a7c733798266565bf
+message: Add GitHub Pages workflow for examples deployment
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 876deb810bbacf540b72c98bdca4b30c32f9b3e7
+message: Add watch script and refresh package docs/manifest
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 4a1bd270d793a35d6a39736b6e5360abdebe6876
+message: Refactor components, expand utilities, themes, and demos
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: f1ebac4ca9052dfab385b29788acee6aa484f2ea
+message: Fix Pages deploy by copying src/themes/dist into examples
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: a3e6359b8764fd683cb35de4ced0d1668215ac7c
+message: Serve minified bundle on GitHub Pages examples
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 2401e63c0b5a0fc5aad78fbe4308bcc598e7852d
+message: Unify file upload/dropzone and enforce default translate metadata
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 52f048bdfd7fb60f73cf2ad8bd6b796a7f70085f
+message: Update npm/docs links and improve table/data-grid utilities demos
+
+[25th Feb 2026] Commit: 31161d80e2ab36ece01999af6127576dbca017c0
+message: chore: prep release
+
+v0.1.1 [25th Feb 2026] Commit: 1ba5012a8f4775e0919f619b076358f1abcd6a72
+message: 0.1.1
+

public/versions/v0.1.1/meta.json

back to top 
diff --git a/public/versions/v0.1.1/meta.json b/public/versions/v0.1.1/meta.json
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c6f0dad
--- /dev/null

+<!doctype html>
+<html lang="en">
+  <head>
+    <meta charset="utf-8" />
+    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
+    <title>v0.1.3 · Kitsune Changelog</title>
+
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/themes/simple.css" />
+    <script defer src="https://bareframe.org//versions/0.1.2/bareframe.min.js"></script>
+    <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/kitsune-docs.css" />
+  </head>
+  <body class="bf">
+    <header class="bf-nav">
+      <div class="bf-container bf-row bf-between bf-center">
+        <a class="bf-brand ks-brand" href="../index.html">
+          <img src="../assets/kitsune-logo.svg" alt="Kitsune logo" class="ks-logo" />
+          <span>Kitsune</span>
+        </a>
+        <nav class="bf-row bf-gap-sm">
+          <a href="../index.html">Versions</a>
+          <a href="../../../docs/index.html">Docs</a>
+        </nav>
+      </div>
+    </header>
+
+    <main class="bf-container ks-page">
+      <section class="ks-hero">
+        <p class="ks-kicker">Changelog</p>
+        <h1>v0.1.3</h1>
+        <p class="ks-meta">
+          Range: <code>v0.1.2</code> → <code>v0.1.3</code>
+          <span class="ks-dot">·</span>
+          Commits: <code>a835113</code> → <code>dfc0a90</code>
+        </p>
+      </section>
+
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Changes</h2>
+        <ul class="ks-changes">
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/7ba4d248cc7f548fabeab51735121d9499611fa2"><code class="ks-sha">7ba4d24</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">25th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Unify editor component and add PayPal donate button to examples</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/5a678ca9d72877f8ebfae54b3baa21544b26d0d1"><code class="ks-sha">5a678ca</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">26th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Move examples to public and add versioned GitHub Pages builds</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/e9981f5bbee24d3cba2e1ebcc6d9c232370e7468"><code class="ks-sha">e9981f5</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">26th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Include themes in versioned GitHub Pages snapshots</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/c8bcd3ccfb7f56d74a26feb55847222ef7d3e27f"><code class="ks-sha">c8bcd3c</code></a>
+              
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">26th Feb 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">Prepare v0.1.3: remove default placeholder text in components</div>
+          </li>
+          
+          <li>
+            <div class="ks-change-head">
+              
+                <a class="ks-sha-link" href="https://github.com/SamuelDBines/bareframe/commit/dfc0a905fecf2f07f0f60ced340f0fc2d8bd2a2f"><code class="ks-sha">dfc0a90</code></a>
+              
+              
+                <span class="ks-tag-pill">v0.1.3</span>
+              
+              <span class="ks-date">1st Mar 2026</span>
+            </div>
+            <div class="ks-change-body">chore: update dist, public, scripts, src</div>
+          </li>
+          
+        </ul>
+      </section>
+
+      
+      <section class="ks-card">
+        <h2>Downloads</h2>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Binaries for v0.1.3:</p>
+        <ul class="ks-downloads">
+

+            <a class="ks-link" href=""></a>

+          </li>
+          
+        </ul>

+      
+
+      <footer class="ks-footer">
+        <div class="ks-divider"></div>
+        <p class="ks-muted">Generated by <strong>Kitsune</strong>.</p>
+      </footer>
+    </main>
+  </body>
+</html>

+# Kitsune Changelog: v0.1.3
+
+Range: `v0.1.2` -> `v0.1.3`
+
+- **7ba4d24 (25th Feb 2026)**: Unify editor component and add PayPal donate button to examples
+- **5a678ca (26th Feb 2026)**: Move examples to public and add versioned GitHub Pages builds
+- **e9981f5 (26th Feb 2026)**: Include themes in versioned GitHub Pages snapshots
+- **c8bcd3c (26th Feb 2026)**: Prepare v0.1.3: remove default placeholder text in components
+- **dfc0a90 (v0.1.3, 1st Mar 2026)**: chore: update dist, public, scripts, src
+

 		return `
 <bf-dropdown>
-  <div class="stack">
-    <bf-button>Actions</bf-button>
-    <div class="stack" style="max-width: 240px;">

+  <button slot="content" item value="team">Team settings</button>
+  <button slot="content" item value="audit">Audit log</button>
+  <button slot="content" item value="signout">Sign out</button>
 </bf-dropdown>`.trim();
 	}
 	if (slug === 'editor') {

src/dropdown/dropdown.css

back to top 
diff --git a/src/dropdown/dropdown.css b/src/dropdown/dropdown.css
index 8baad56..73fb69d 100644
--- a/src/dropdown/dropdown.css
+++ b/src/dropdown/dropdown.css
@@ -6,25 +6,149 @@
 	--bf-dropdown-border-color: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-border-color, var(--bf-theme-border-1, #cbd5e1));
 	--bf-dropdown-bg: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));
 	--bf-dropdown-color: var(--bf-theme-dropdown-color, var(--bf-theme-text-1, #0f172a));
-	--bf-dropdown-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.6rem);
-	--bf-dropdown-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.9rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-muted: var(--bf-theme-text-2, #475569);
+	--bf-dropdown-accent: var(--bf-theme-button-primary-bg, #2563eb);
+	--bf-dropdown-padding-y: var(--bf-theme-space-2, 0.45rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-padding-x: var(--bf-theme-space-3, 0.75rem);
+	--bf-dropdown-shadow: 0 14px 28px -18px rgba(2, 6, 23, 0.45);
 	--bf-dropdown-transition:
 		var(--bf-theme-transition-bg, background-color 120ms ease),
 		var(--bf-theme-transition-color, color 120ms ease),
-		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease);
+		var(--bf-theme-transition-border, border-color 120ms ease),
+		transform 120ms ease,
+		opacity 120ms ease;
 
-	display: block;
+	display: inline-block;
 	font: var(--bf-dropdown-font);
 	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	position: relative;
 }
 
 .root {
-	background: var(--bf-dropdown-bg);
+	position: relative;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+}
+
+.toggle {
+	display: inline-flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	gap: 0.45rem;
+	border: 0;
+	border-radius: var(--bf-dropdown-radius);
+	background: transparent;
 	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	padding: 0;
+	cursor: pointer;
+	font: inherit;
+	transition: var(--bf-dropdown-transition);
+}
+
+.toggle:hover {
+	color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 70%, var(--bf-dropdown-color));
+}
+
+.toggle:focus-visible {
+	outline: none;
+	box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 36%, transparent);
+}
+
+.toggle-label {
+	display: inline-flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	gap: 0.35rem;
+	min-height: 1.75rem;
+}
+
+.caret {
+	font-size: 0.75rem;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-muted);
+	transition: transform 140ms ease;
+}
+
+.root[data-open='true'] .caret {
+	transform: rotate(180deg);
+}
+
+.menu {
+	position: absolute;
+	min-width: 100%;
+	max-width: 320px;
+	z-index: 60;
 	border-width: var(--bf-dropdown-border-width);
 	border-style: var(--bf-dropdown-border-style);
 	border-color: var(--bf-dropdown-border-color);
-	border-radius: var(--bf-dropdown-radius);
-	padding: var(--bf-dropdown-padding-y) var(--bf-dropdown-padding-x);
+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius) + 2px);
+	background: var(--bf-dropdown-bg);
+	box-shadow: var(--bf-dropdown-shadow);
+	padding: 0.35rem;
+	overflow: auto;
+	max-height: min(340px, 70vh);
+	opacity: 0;
+	transform: translateY(-4px);
+	pointer-events: none;
 	transition: var(--bf-dropdown-transition);
 }
+
+.root[data-open='true'] .menu {
+	opacity: 1;
+	transform: translateY(0);
+	pointer-events: auto;
+}
+
+.root[data-position='bottom-start'] .menu {
+	left: 0;
+	top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='bottom-end'] .menu {
+	right: 0;
+	top: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='top-start'] .menu {
+	left: 0;
+	bottom: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.root[data-position='top-end'] .menu {
+	right: 0;
+	bottom: calc(100% + 0.35rem);
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]),
+.menu ::slotted([item]),
+.menu ::slotted(a),
+.menu ::slotted(button) {
+	display: flex;
+	align-items: center;
+	width: 100%;
+	gap: 0.45rem;
+	border: 0;
+	background: transparent;
+	color: var(--bf-dropdown-color);
+	text-decoration: none;
+	border-radius: calc(var(--bf-dropdown-radius) - 2px);
+	padding: 0.5rem 0.6rem;
+	cursor: pointer;
+	text-align: left;
+	font: inherit;
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted(*) + ::slotted(*) {
+	margin-top: 0.15rem;
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]:hover),
+.menu ::slotted([item]:hover),
+.menu ::slotted(a:hover),
+.menu ::slotted(button:hover) {
+	background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 12%, transparent);
+}
+
+.menu ::slotted([data-bf-dropdown-item]:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted([item]:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted(a:focus-visible),
+.menu ::slotted(button:focus-visible) {
+	outline: none;
+	box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-dropdown-accent) 42%, transparent);
+}

src/dropdown/dropdown.js

back to top 
diff --git a/src/dropdown/dropdown.js b/src/dropdown/dropdown.js
index efbaee6..404e364 100644
--- a/src/dropdown/dropdown.js
+++ b/src/dropdown/dropdown.js
@@ -1,11 +1,19 @@
 class BfDropdown extends HTMLElement {
+	static observedAttributes = ['open', 'position'];
+
 	constructor() {
 		super();
 		this.attachShadow({ mode: 'open' });
+		this._onToggleClick = this._onToggleClick.bind(this);
+		this._onDocumentClick = this._onDocumentClick.bind(this);
+		this._onKeyDown = this._onKeyDown.bind(this);
+		this._onContentClick = this._onContentClick.bind(this);
+		this._onSlotChange = this._onSlotChange.bind(this);
 	}
 
 	connectedCallback() {
 		if (this._initialized) {
+			this._sync();
 			return;
 		}
 		this._initialized = true;
@@ -18,10 +26,231 @@ class BfDropdown extends HTMLElement {
 		const root = document.createElement('div');
 		root.className = 'root';
 		root.setAttribute('part', 'root');
-		root.innerHTML = '<slot></slot>';
-
+		root.innerHTML = `
+			<div class="toggle" part="toggle" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false">
+				<span class="toggle-label"><slot name="trigger">Open</slot></span>
+				<span class="caret" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
+			</div>
+			<div class="menu" part="menu" role="menu">
+				<slot name="content"></slot>
+			</div>
+		`;
 
 		this.shadowRoot.replaceChildren(link, root);
+		this._root = root;
+		this._toggle = root.querySelector('.toggle');
+		this._menu = root.querySelector('.menu');
+		this._triggerSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="trigger"]');
+		this._contentSlot = root.querySelector('slot[name="content"]');
+
+		this._toggle.addEventListener('click', this._onToggleClick);
+		this._toggle.addEventListener('keydown', this._onKeyDown);
+		this._menu.addEventListener('click', this._onContentClick);
+		this._triggerSlot.addEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		this._contentSlot.addEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		document.addEventListener('click', this._onDocumentClick);
+
+		this._assignSlots();
+		this._decorateItems();
+		this._sync();
+	}
+
+	disconnectedCallback() {
+		document.removeEventListener('click', this._onDocumentClick);
+		if (this._toggle) {
+			this._toggle.removeEventListener('click', this._onToggleClick);
+			this._toggle.removeEventListener('keydown', this._onKeyDown);
+		}
+		if (this._menu) {
+			this._menu.removeEventListener('click', this._onContentClick);
+		}
+		if (this._triggerSlot) {
+			this._triggerSlot.removeEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		}
+		if (this._contentSlot) {
+			this._contentSlot.removeEventListener('slotchange', this._onSlotChange);
+		}
+	}
+
+	attributeChangedCallback() {
+		this._sync();
+	}
+
+	open() {
+		this.setAttribute('open', '');
+	}
+
+	close() {
+		this.removeAttribute('open');
+	}
+
+	toggle() {
+		if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			this.close();
+			return;
+		}
+		this.open();
+	}
+
+	_onSlotChange() {
+		this._assignSlots();
+		this._decorateItems();
+	}
+
+	_assignSlots() {
+		const candidates = [...this.children].filter(
+			(element) => element.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE,
+		);
+		if (!candidates.length) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const hasTrigger = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute('slot') === 'trigger');
+		const hasContent = candidates.some((el) => el.getAttribute('slot') === 'content');
+		if (!hasTrigger) {
+			candidates[0].setAttribute('slot', 'trigger');
+		}
+		if (!hasContent) {
+			for (let i = 1; i < candidates.length; i += 1) {
+				candidates[i].setAttribute('slot', 'content');
+			}
+		}
+	}
+
+	_actionableItems() {
+		const assigned = this._contentSlot?.assignedElements({ flatten: true }) || [];
+		const items = [];
+		for (const element of assigned) {
+			if (element.matches?.('a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]')) {
+				items.push(element);
+			}
+			items.push(
+				...element.querySelectorAll(
+					'a,button,[item],[role="menuitem"],[tabindex]',
+				),
+			);
+		}
+		return items;
+	}
+
+	_decorateItems() {
+		const items = this._actionableItems();
+		for (const item of items) {
+			item.setAttribute('data-bf-dropdown-item', '');
+			if (item.hasAttribute('item') && !item.hasAttribute('role')) {
+				item.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem');
+			}
+			if (!item.hasAttribute('tabindex')) {
+				item.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
+			}
+			if (item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled !== 'true') {
+				item.style.display = 'flex';
+				item.style.alignItems = 'center';
+				item.style.width = '100%';
+				item.style.gap = '0.45rem';
+				item.style.border = '0';
+				item.style.background = 'transparent';
+				item.style.borderRadius = '0.4rem';
+				item.style.padding = '0.5rem 0.6rem';
+				item.style.cursor = 'pointer';
+				item.style.textAlign = 'left';
+				item.style.font = 'inherit';
+				item.style.color = 'inherit';
+				item.style.textDecoration = 'none';
+				item.dataset.bfDropdownStyled = 'true';
+			}
+		}
+	}
+
+	_focusFirstItem() {
+		const items = this._actionableItems();
+		const first = items.find((item) => !item.hasAttribute('disabled'));
+		first?.focus();
+	}
+
+	_emitSelect(target) {
+		const value = target.getAttribute('value') || target.textContent?.trim() || '';
+		this.dispatchEvent(
+			new CustomEvent('bf-select', {
+				bubbles: true,
+				composed: true,
+				detail: {
+					id: target.id || '',
+					value,
+				},
+			}),
+		);
+	}
+
+	_onContentClick(event) {
+		const target = event.target instanceof Element
+			? event.target.closest('[data-bf-dropdown-item]')
+			: null;
+		if (!target) {
+			return;
+		}
+		this._emitSelect(target);
+		this.close();
+	}
+
+	_onToggleClick() {
+		this.toggle();
+		if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+		}
+	}
+
+	_onDocumentClick(event) {
+		if (!this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const path = event.composedPath();
+		if (path.includes(this)) {
+			return;
+		}
+		this.close();
+	}
+
+	_onKeyDown(event) {
+		if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
+			event.preventDefault();
+			this.toggle();
+			if (this.hasAttribute('open')) {
+				requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+			}
+			return;
+		}
+		if (event.key === 'ArrowDown') {
+			event.preventDefault();
+			this.open();
+			requestAnimationFrame(() => this._focusFirstItem());
+			return;
+		}
+		if (event.key === 'Escape') {
+			this.close();
+			this._toggle?.focus();
+		}
+	}
+
+	_position() {
+		const value = (this.getAttribute('position') || 'bottom-start').toLowerCase();
+		if (
+			['bottom-start', 'bottom-end', 'top-start', 'top-end'].includes(value)
+		) {
+			return value;
+		}
+		return 'bottom-start';
+	}
+
+	_sync() {
+		if (!this._root || !this._toggle || !this._menu) {
+			return;
+		}
+		const open = this.hasAttribute('open');
+		this._root.setAttribute('data-open', open ? 'true' : 'false');
+		this._root.setAttribute('data-position', this._position());
+		this._toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
+		this._toggle.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
+		this._menu.hidden = !open;
 	}
 }

@@ -3,11 +3,11 @@
 	--bf-editor-radius: var(--bf-theme-radius-md, 8px);
 	--bf-editor-border-width: var(--bf-theme-border-width, 1px);
 	--bf-editor-border-style: var(--bf-theme-border-style, solid);

-	--bf-editor-bg: var(--bf-theme-editor-bg, var(--bf-theme-surface-1, #ffffff));

-	--bf-editor-muted: var(--bf-theme-text-2, #64748b);
-	--bf-editor-code-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-editor-bg) 86%, #0f172a 14%);

+	--bf-editor-bg: var(--bf-theme-editor-bg, #000000);
+	--bf-editor-color: var(--bf-theme-editor-color, #f8fafc);
+	--bf-editor-muted: var(--bf-theme-editor-muted, #94a3b8);
+	--bf-editor-code-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bf-editor-bg) 94%, #111827 6%);
 	--bf-editor-code-color: #e2e8f0;
 
 	display: block;
